zh.lifeSummary: 當Gertrude of Nesle於1179年出生在法國諾門迪時，她的父親Jean de Nesle29歲，母親Elizabeth de Lambersart25歲。她和Renaud Ier de Mello至少有2個女兒。她去世於1229年在她的家鄉享年50歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gertrude of Nesle于1179年出生在法国諾門迪时，她的父亲Jean de Nesle29岁，母亲Elizabeth de Lambersart25岁。她和Renaud Ier de Mello至少有2个女儿。她去世于1229年在她的家乡享年50岁。

nameMeanings.name: Gertrude
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Germanic female personal name, derived from gār, gēr ‘spear’ + þrūþ ‘strength’. The name is not found in England immediately after the Conquest, but only in the later Middle English period. It may have been introduced by migrants from the Low Countries who came to England in connection with the cloth trade, and was certainly in consistent use in some areas throughout the 16th and 17th centuries, although it was not generally popular until the 19th century, when many medieval names were revived. It has now fallen from favour again.

meanings: Short form of Oswald or any of the various other names beginning with Os-.

en.lifeSummary: When Gertrude of Nesle was born in 1179, in Normandy, France, her father, Jean de Nesle, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth de Lambersart, was 25. She had at least 2 daughters with Renaud Ier de Mello. She died in 1229, in her hometown, at the age of 50.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gertrude of Nesle est née en 1179, à Normandie, France, son père, Jean de Nesle, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth de Lambersart, avait 25 ans. Elle a eu au moins 2 filles avec Renaud Ier de Mello. Elle est décédée en 1229, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gertrude of Nesle 1179 in Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean de Nesle 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth de Lambersart 25. Sie hatte mit Renaud Ier de Mello mindestens 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1229 im Alter von 50 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude of Nesle è nata il nel 1179 nel Normandie, Francia, sua padre, Jean de Nesle, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth de Lambersart, aveva 25 anni. Lei avuto almeno 2 figlie con Renaud Ier de Mello. Morì nel 1229, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Gertrude of Nesleが1179年にフランスノーマンディで生まれた時，父Jean de Nesleは29歳，母Elizabeth de Lambersartは25歳であった。彼女はRenaud Ier de Melloとの間に少なくとも2人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1229年に故郷で50歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gertrude of Nesle(이)가 1179년 프랑스 노먼디에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean de Nesle(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth de Lambersart(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 Renaud Ier de Mello(와)과 적어도 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1229년 그녀의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gertrude of Nesle nasceu em 1179, em Normandie, França, seu pai, Jean de Nesle, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth de Lambersart, tinha 25 anos. Ela teve pelo menos 2 filhas com Renaud Ier de Mello. Ela faleceu em 1229, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gertrude of Nesle родилась в 1179 г. в местности норманди, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean de Nesle было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth de Lambersart, 25. У неё было по крайней мере 2 дочери от Renaud Ier de Mello. Она умерла в 1229 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 50 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gertrude of Nesle nació en 1179, en Normandie, Francia, su papá, Jean de Nesle, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth de Lambersart, tenía 25 años. Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijas con Renaud Ier de Mello. Murió en 1229, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años.
